title: Ronggeng Kematian
overview: Four friends ensnared in a village, haunted by a ghost because of their sins in the past. They are forced to confront the malevolent specter that hungers for retribution, a horrifying Ronggeng dancer ghost determined to unleash its vengeance upon them.
